title: Immich Helm chart values
description: The controllers, server, machine-learning and valkey sections are full bjw-s common library value sets and are validated against its schema; the immich section is specific to this chart.

enabled.description: Create the service monitors needed to monitor Immich with the Prometheus operator.

library.description: Main data store for all assets, shared between the components.

existingClaim.description: Name of the existing PersistentVolumeClaim holding the Immich library.

configuration.description: Optional immich-config.json expressed as YAML. Ignored if existingConfiguration is set. See https://immich.app/docs/install/config-file/

configurationKind.description: Resource kind used to store the Immich configuration.

existingConfiguration.description: Name of an existing configuration resource to use instead of creating one.

server.description: Immich server component. A full bjw-s common library value set.

machine-learning.description: Immich machine-learning component. A full bjw-s common library value set.

valkey.description: Bundled Valkey dependency. A full bjw-s common library value set.

allOf.description: Shared common library values applied to all components.
